---
title: "mostCitedNet"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-18"
---

```{r}
# Install if needed
if (!requireNamespace("BoolNet", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("BoolNet")
}
library(BoolNet)

# ---------------------------
# EGFR Boolean network model
# ---------------------------
egfr_rules <- c(
  "targets, factors",
  "EGF, EGF",                     # input node (self-loop)
  "EGFR, EGF",
  "RAS, EGFR",
  "RAF, RAS",
  "MEK, RAF",
  "ERK, MEK",
  "PI3K, EGFR",
  "AKT, PI3K",
  "MTOR, AKT",
  "PROLIFERATION, ERK | MTOR"
)

egfr_net <- loadNetwork(textConnection(egfr_rules))

print(egfr_net)
# Simulate dynamics
(sim <- generateTimeSeries(
  egfr_net,
  numSeries = 1,
  numMeasurements = 20
))
```


```{r}
library(reshape2)

mat <- sim[[1]]
df <- melt(mat)

colnames(df) <- c("gene", "time", "state")

ggplot(df, aes(x = time, y = gene, fill = factor(state))) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("white", "red")) +
  labs(
    title = "EGFR Boolean State Dynamics",
    x = "Time",
    y = "Gene"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
# Attractors (steady states)
attr <- getAttractors(egfr_net)
plotAttractors(attr)
print(attr)

# Perturbation: EGFR inhibition
egfr_ko <- fixGenes(egfr_net, genes = "EGFR", values = 0)
egfr_attr_ko <- getAttractors(egfr_ko)
plotAttractors(egfr_attr_ko)

```



```{r}
library(xml2)

unzip("/Users/nvd448/Documents/SOORENA/caseStudy/TCRsig40.zginml",
      exdir = "/Users/nvd448/Documents/SOORENA/caseStudy")
doc <- read_xml("~/Documents/SOORENA/caseStudy/regulatoryGraph.ginml")

# Extract nodes
nodes <- xml_find_all(doc, ".//node")
node_ids <- xml_attr(nodes, "id")

# Extract edges
edges <- xml_find_all(doc, ".//edge")
from <- xml_attr(edges, "from")
to <- xml_attr(edges, "to")

data.frame(from, to)

edges <- xml_find_all(doc, ".//edge")

df <- data.frame(
  from = xml_attr(edges, "from"),
  to   = xml_attr(edges, "to")
)

g <- graph_from_data_frame(df)

plot(g)
```
